title: Sprint Planning Notes
body: Discussed backlog priorities for Q2. Focus on API performance and onboarding flow improvements. Sarah to lead the performance audit, Bob to handle onboarding wireframes.

title: App Gamification Concept
body: What if we added streaks for completing tasks on time? Could show a flame emoji next to the task count. Maybe weekly summaries with fun stats like 'You completed 12 tasks this week!'

title: Vite Environment Variables
body: Prefix all client-side env vars with VITE_. Access via import.meta.env.VITE_VAR_NAME. Server-only vars without the prefix are not exposed to the browser.
